name: Tangy Spare Ribs
recipeIngredient: 1/8 teaspoon Each: pepper and chili powder
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut ribs into serving-size pieces; place on a rack in a shallow roasting pan.
2. Bake uncovered at 350°F for 1 hour.
3. Meanwhile, in a medium saucepan, saut onion and celery in butter for 4-5 minutes or until tender.
4. Add remaining ingredients; mix well.
5. Bring to a boil; reduce heat.
6. Cook and stir until slightly thickened, about 10 minutes.
7. Remove from the heat.
8. Drain fat from roasting pan.
9. Pour sauce over ribs.
10. Bake an additional 1-1/2 hours or until meat is tender.
